f,F in ipairs({{-267516+267517;-991906-(-992400)};{407928+-407927,-290071-(-290262)},{233079-232887;291074+-290580}})do while F[-1001316+1001317]<F[660336+-660334]do x[F[-305121+305122]],x[F[826838-826836]],F[-936227-(-936228)],F[-838373+838375]=x[F[-540977-(-540979)]],x[F[162597+-162596]],F[-528443-(-528444)]+(792373+-792372),F[-677854+677856]-(721876-721875)end end local function f(f)return x[f+(-507691-(-571424))]end do local f=math.floor local F=string.len local c=table.concat local H=type local X=table.insert local P=x local K=string.sub local B=string.char local return(function(x,c,H,X,P,K,B,j,Z,g,y,E,q,a,M,v,o,p,U,d,F,G,V)g,y,j,E,U,Z,G,p,d,o,a,V,F,q,M,v=function(x)local f,F=-470849+470850,x[986979-986978]while F do H=function(H)return F(x,{H},f,c)end return H end,function()G=(823867-823866)+G E[G]=-773573-(-773574)return G end,function(x,f)local c=Z(f)local H=function(H,X,P,K,B)return F(x,{H;X,P,K;B},f,c)end return H end return(o(269778+12063774,{}))(c(B))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[f(136716+-200156)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
